verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Christ is my reward And all of my devotion Now there's nothing in this world That could ever satisfy

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Through every trial My soul will sing No turning back I've been set free

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Christ is enough for me Christ is enough for me Everything I need is in You Everything I need

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Christ my all in all The joy of my salvation And this hope will never fail Heaven is our home

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Through every storm My soul will sing Jesus is here To God be the glory

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Christ is enough for me Christ is enough for me Everything I need is in You Everything I need

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: I have decided to follow Jesus No turning back No turning back

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: The cross before me, The world behind me No turning back No turning back

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: Christ is enough for me Christ is enough for me Everything I need is in You Everything I need

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: I have decided to follow Jesus No turning back No turning back
